title: DesignSubmission
description: A City agency (or its design consultant, via the agency's PDC liaison) submitting a project for Public Design Commission design review — the net-new WRITE surface for this agency. PDC is agency-facing, not citizen-facing: only a City agency with jurisdiction over the property may submit, and there is NO public/citizen write anywhere in the domain. Today submission is fully MANUAL and PDF-based — a signed application form (which must list the Community Board(s) and City Council District(s)), the category-specific checklist, and drawings/photos/samples are emailed by the agency liaison by the 12:00pm submission deadline; approved projects then deliver hard copies to City Hall. There is no online portal and no submission API. This schema digitizes that transmittal so an owned PDC API can accept a structured submission. It serves both the write surface (submit) and the read surface (status of a submission). On disposition, the reviewed project appears in the Monthly Design Review / Annual Report datasets — see design-project.json.

x-source.channel_today: manual PDF application form + checklist emailed by City agency liaison; hard copies delivered to City Hall

submissionId.description: Server-assigned submission id / docket. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Submission lifecycle status. Set by PDC staff / the Commission, not the submitter. Aligns with the ReviewAction/ReviewResult vocabularies once the project is calendared and reviewed.

category.description: Which of PDC's five submission categories governs the checklist and requirements. Required on create.

description.description: Description of the proposed work on/over City-owned property.

leadAgency.description: The City agency with jurisdiction over the property, which must make the formal submission. Required — an artist or private team cannot submit directly; the sponsoring agency does.

secondaryAgencies.description: Additional City agencies with overlapping jurisdiction that must sign the application.

liaison.description: The submitting agency's designated PDC liaison, who transmits the submission on behalf of the agency and its consultants.

address.description: Street address / location of the project site.

communityBoards.description: Community Board(s) covering the site — required on the application form.

councilDistricts.description: City Council District(s) covering the site — required on the application form.

interagencyApprovals.description: Confirmations that required approvals from other City agencies have been obtained prior to submission (e.g. Landmarks Preservation Commission where the site is a landmark).

attachments.description: Submission package materials, referenced by URL or upload token — replacing today's emailed PDF/samples.

applicationSigned.description: Whether the application is signed by all involved City agencies, as required.

previousProjectId.description: PROJECT_ID of a prior related PDC submission, for resubmissions / amended reviews.

targetMeetingDate.description: The meeting cycle the submission is aimed at (must meet that cycle's submission deadline).
